name: Hiruko Sasori (S)
description: Hiruko is a puppet used by the Akatsuki shinobi, Sasori. Serving as a 'puppet armor', it allowed Sasori to hide inside of it. Hiruko is a human puppet made from the corpse of a renowned shinobi - this puppet is also Sasori's favorite.

skills.name: Poisonous Tail Stab
skills.description: Deal 15 Affliction damage to one enemy and apply 'Venom Stack'. This skill will cost 1 random chakra for 1 turn after being used. If the target already has a 'Venom Stack', deal an additional 5 damage per stack and place a 'Venom Stack' on all other enemies.

skills.name: Sand Clone Trap
skills.description: For 1 turn, Hiruko or an ally ignores all damage dealt. During this turn, each enemy that uses a new skill on them takes 10 affliction damage* and gains 1 'Venom Stack'. This skill is Invisible. This skill ends if Hiruko Dies.

skills.name: Puppet Reveal
skills.description: Sasori activates 'Puppet Reveal'. The next time his health reaches 50 or less, he will gain 20 points of destructible defense for 3 turns. During this time, 'Sand Close Trap' and 'Puppet Reveal' will be replaced. This skill is invisible and can only be used once.

skills.name: Tail Deflection
skills.description: This skill makes Hiruko Sasori (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Eight Waves of Needles
skills.description: Apply 2 'Needle Marks' to all enemies for 2 turns. When an enemy with 'Needle Marks' receive damage from Hiruko or his allies, remove 1 Mark to deal 10 Affliction damage.

skills.name: Prosthetic Arm Senbon
skills.description: Consume all Needle Marks on all enemies: for each Mark removed, that enemy takes 15 Affliction damage and If at-least 5 Marks are consumed in total, Sasori becomes Invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Poison Stack
skills.description: Venom Stack: The following turn, this enemy receives 5 Affliction damage for 2 turns.
